case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. JOSE DAVID MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-22-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-30-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIO INTERIANO--SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---VICTOR ORTIZ.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. PER JUAQUIN, FRONT DESK STAFF, PERSON TO BE SERVED DOES NOT WORK AT THIS LOCATION. SUBSERVICE WAS REFUSED. (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,851.63 AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID
DECLARATION OF APOYO FINANCIERO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-25-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALTEZ-HERNANDEZ, JOSE DAVID $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
